channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: NATO chief says Europeans have ‘gotten the message’ from Trump on defence
item.description: The US president has accused some NATO countries of not doing enough to support the US-Israel war on Iran.

item.title: ‘I can’t feel my leg’: Israeli gunfire disables teenagers in West Bank
item.description: Al Jazeera visits refugee camp in the occupied West Bank where Israeli soldiers have killed or maimed many young people.

item.title: Iran war: What’s happening on day 66 as Trump announces Hormuz mission?
item.description: Trump orders new Hormuz mission after Iran says it receives US response to its peace proposal.

item.title: Japan PM: Hormuz closure ‘inflicting enormous impact’ on Asia Pacific
item.description: Japan’s PM says the effective closure of the Strait of Hormuz is ‘inflicting an ‘enormous impact’ on Asia Pacific.

item.title: Iran warns US to stay out of Hormuz after Trump says US will ‘guide’ ships
item.description: President Trump said the US will begin Project Freedom on Monday to guide stranded ships out of the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Crew of Iranian ship seized by US forces evacuated to Pakistan, gov’t says
item.description: Twenty-two crew members from the seized Iranian ship MV Touska have been transferred to Pakistan for repatriation.

item.title: Former NYC Mayor Giuliani hospitalised in ‘critical condition’
item.description: Spokesman says Giuliani in 'critical but stable' condition as President Trump hails 'true warrior'.

item.title: Japan PM says Iran war oil crisis having ‘enormous impact’ in Asia Pacific
item.description: Sanae Takaichi makes comments during a visit to Australia, where she signs agreements on energy supplies.

item.title: North Korean women’s club to play rare football match in the South
item.description: Naegohyang FC will play the South's Suwon FC on May 20 in the semifinal of the Women's Asian Champions League.

item.title: All-round hero Hardie helps Babar Azam’s Peshawar Zalmi win PSL 2026
item.description: Hardie's 4 wickets and 56 runs help secure Peshawar's second PSL title with a five-wicket win over Hyderabad Kingsmen.

item.title: How to escape Russia’s army: Soldiers serving in Ukraine seek a way out
item.description: Russia's army faces a desertion crisis as it continues to use waves of soldiers to attack Ukraine's defensive positions.

item.title: Fireworks in Milan as Inter clinch Serie A title with a 2-0 win over Parma
item.description: Inter Milan win their 21st Scudetto, edging Napoli, with three matches remaining in the Italian football league season.

item.title: Detained Gaza aid flotilla activists arrive in Netherlands
item.description: Two activists from the Global Sumud Flotilla arrived in the Netherlands after being released from Israeli custody.

item.title: Trump says US to begin ‘guiding’ ships in Strait of Hormuz
item.description: US President Donald Trump has announced a naval mission to 'guide' stranded ships through the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Oil prices flat as Trump’s plan for Strait of Hormuz fails to calm market
item.description: Brent crude is largely unmoved by Trump's announcement of the operation, dubbed 'Project Freedom'.

item.title: Illegal ‘free party’ at French military site draws up to 40,000 ravers
item.description: Tens of thousands of partygoers gathered for an illegal “free party” at a military firing range near Bourges.

item.title: Iran war live: US warship attacked with missiles in Hormuz by Iran’s navy
item.description: Attack comes after President Trump announced 'Project Freedom' to free stranded ships out of the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Thousands in India’s Manipur mark three years since ethnic clashes began
item.description: Thousands of protesters gathered in India’s Manipur state to mark three years since ethnic violence erupted.

item.title: Three dead in suspected hantavirus outbreak on Atlantic cruise ship
item.description: Three of six passengers ill from a suspected rodent-transmitted virus have died, and one is in intensive care, WHO says.

item.title: French left-wing’s Melenchon says he will run for president in 2027
item.description: Melenchon says he will make fourth bid for presidency with President Macron term-limited and Le Pen facing ban.

item.title: Real Madrid stays alive in La Liga title race with victory at Espanyol
item.description: Two goals by Vinicius Jr allowed Madrid to remain in title contention with Barcelona ahead of El Clasico next Sunday.

item.title: Iran lawmaker says Strait of Hormuz will not return to pre‑war state
item.description: Iran says the Strait of Hormuz will never return to the status quo that existed before the US-Israel war on Tehran.

item.title: Trump says US will ‘help free up’ ships stuck in Hormuz Strait
item.description: US president says any interference with operation, which will start on Monday, will 'have to be dealt with forcefully'.

item.title: Is Mali’s military government losing control?
item.description: A coalition of armed groups and rebels challenges the military government's authority.

item.title: Kimi Antonelli wins Miami GP to extend F1 title lead
item.description: Nineteen-year-old becomes the first driver in F1 history to convert his first three pole positions into race victories.
